news.t: ETF Industry Leader Rob Oliver Launches New ETF Provider “Aura,” Debuts U.S. Defense ETF (NYSE: DUTY)

holdings.infoBox: DUTY is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are General Dynamics stock at 7.60%, Lockheed Martin at 7.56%, L3Harris Technologies at 7.09%, Northrop Grumman at 7.01%, and Palantir Technologies at 6.83%.

overview.description: The U.S. Defense ETF (DUTY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive U.S. Defense index, a market-cap-weighted index of pure-play US stocks tied to defense-related activities DUTY was launched on Apr 8, 2026 and is issued by Aura.

data.title: ETF Industry Leader Rob Oliver Launches New ETF Provider “Aura,” Debuts U.S. Defense ETF (NYSE: DUTY)
data.text: As part of the launch, Aura will donate 10% of DUTY's total management fee revenue to charitable organizations supporting military veterans As part of the launch, Aura will donate 10% of DUTY's total ...
